creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The USB 058f:3861 device that I have is a portable dental camera, but it probably doesn't have to be.

This C program https://gist.github.com/maxlapshin/1253534#file-capture_raw_frames-c fails to get or set the video format for this device: both VIDIOC_S_FMT and VIDIOC_G_FMT fail with "error 22, Invalid argument". Video format setting and retrieval should work for any camera.

Here is some info about this device in Linux: https://linux-hardware.org/index.php?id=usb:058f-3861

Version: 5.17.1.2
FreeBSD 13.1
